title: Merge the compounding-complete seed-agent-presets-legacy-config worktree into main
action: Feature seed-agent-presets-legacy-config (PBI-041) is compounding-complete: 1 cell capped, doctor-guided fix to seed default agent_presets on legacy config, spec synced, learnings captured. Commit main's and the worktree's trailing bookkeeping, then bee worktree merge --id herdr-gateway--wt--seed-agent-presets-legacy-config --cleanup. Run the full verify chain on the merged tree before commit. Resolve any docs/backlog.md or critical-patterns.md conflicts per established pattern.

truths: Main's and the worktree's pre-merge bookkeeping-only dirty state is committed before the merge runs
git merge --no-ff wt/seed-agent-presets-legacy-config lands on main
The configured verify passes against the merged tree before the merge commit
No conflict markers remain in any merged file
--cleanup removes the worktree, deletes wt/seed-agent-presets-legacy-config, and drops its grant
prohibitions: Do not commit the merge on a red verify
Do not touch the other two worktrees (dedupe-default-config-templates, pbi-046-shell-card-group)

verify: git log --oneline -1 | grep -qi 'merge' && ! grep -rl '^<<<<<<<' --include='*' -- . 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -q . && node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json | grep -qv seed-agent-presets-legacy-config && echo MERGE_OK
